tasks.description: Architected a Python-based IAM API and a Self-Service Frontend to automate RACF user profile provisioning and password resets; significantly reduced Service Desk tickets and modernized legacy access management.

Negotiated and led the deployment of Ansible and XLDeploy within restricted security perimeters. Aligned z/OS, Linux, and DevOps teams to establish a compliant framework for automated security operations.
Engineered a distributed Jenkins architecture utilizing Windows Server nodes to automate the lifecycle of z/OS PowerShell scripts, ensuring versioned delivery and traceability via JFrog Artifactory.
Automated the end-to-end conversion and formatting of SSL/TLS certificates for DB2 ingestion and mainframe hardening, eliminating 400+ annual manual incidents while ensuring full audit traceability.
Deployed and managed critical security microservices on OpenShift, leveraging Kubernetes-native patterns to improve service availability and developer autonomy within a regulated banking environment.
Managed and auto-scaled GitLab CI Runners on GKE, ensuring 99.9% availability for pipeline executions and optimizing resource consumption via preemptible nodes.
Drastically reduced Docker build times and CI latency by implementing advanced layer caching and multi-stage build strategies, accelerating the "code-to-production" cycle.
Led the migration to Google Cloud SQL and performed SQL query optimization, resulting in a measurable reduction in PHP API response times during high-traffic periods.
Developed Python-based automation for Google Cloud Storage provisioning and lifecycle management, ensuring data compliance and reducing storage costs.
Managed production-grade workflows and monitoring, focusing on system-level enhancements to stabilize the e-commerce platform's backend.
Managed and scaled production workloads using Kubernetes (K8s) and Helm, ensuring the stability of critical financial applications and optimizing resource allocation.
Designed and maintained complex GitLab CI pipelines for multi-environment deployments (Dev, QA, Prod), implementing automated testing and security gates.
Built and configured comprehensive monitoring dashboards using Zabbix and Grafana, improving incident detection and reducing Mean Time to Repair (MTTR).
Developed internal tools and application features using Python and Golang to automate repetitive operational tasks and improve system performance.
Operated within strict regulatory frameworks, ensuring all deployments and infrastructure changes adhered to banking-grade security standards.
